{
  "executive_summary": "Decompose the courier platform monolith into 5 bounded contexts mapped to 6 deployable services. The decomposition follows domain boundaries, not technical layers, and is sequenced to extract the highest-risk seam (location tracking at 5K writes/sec) and the highest-consequence seam (payments with strict consistency) as independent services first. An 8-engineer team with moderate operational maturity should NOT attempt a big-bang migration — extract one service at a tim
